content.query:
--View Create for M3.OCHEAD

DROP VIEW M3_OCHEAD

CREATE VIEW M3_OCHEAD AS 

SELECT * 
FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OCHEAD.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
WHERE
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records 
  and CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + WHLO
      + CAST(REPN as VARCHAR(10))
      + CUNO
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in ( 
          SELECT
            CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
          + WHLO
          + CAST(REPN as VARCHAR(10))
          + CUNO
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
          FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OCHEAD.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
          GROUP BY CONO,WHLO,REPN,CUNO
          )

--View Create for M3.OCLINE

DROP VIEW M3_OCLINE

CREATE VIEW M3_OCLINE AS 

SELECT * 
FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OCLINE.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
WHERE
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records 
  and CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + WHLO 
      + CAST(REPN AS VARCHAR(10)) 
      + CAST(RELI AS VARCHAR(5)) 
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in ( 
          SELECT
            CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + WHLO 
            + CAST(REPN AS VARCHAR(10)) 
            + CAST(RELI AS VARCHAR(5)) 
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
          FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OCLINE.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
          GROUP BY CONO,WHLO,REPN,RELI
          )
  
  --View Create for M3.CIDADR

DROP VIEW M3_CIDADR

CREATE VIEW M3_CIDADR AS 

SELECT * 
FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/CIDADR.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
WHERE
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records 
  and CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + SUNO
      + CAST(ADTE as VARCHAR(2))
      + ADID
      + CAST(STDT as VARCHAR(8))
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in ( 
          SELECT
            CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + SUNO
            + CAST(ADTE as VARCHAR(2))
            + ADID
            + CAST(STDT as VARCHAR(8))
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
          FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/CIDADR.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
          GROUP BY CONO,SUNO,ADTE,ADID,STDT
          )

--View Create for M3.CIDVEN

DROP VIEW M3_CIDVEN

FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/CIDVEN.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
WHERE
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records 
  and CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + SUNO
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in ( 
          SELECT
            CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + SUNO
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
          FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/CIDVEN.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
          GROUP BY CONO,SUNO 
          )

--View Create for M3.FAPCHK

DROP VIEW M3_FAPCHK

CREATE VIEW M3_FAPCHK AS 

SELECT * 
FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FAPCHK.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
WHERE
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records 
  and CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + DIVI 
      + BKID
      + CHKN
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in ( 
          SELECT
            CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + DIVI 
            + BKID
            + CHKN
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
          FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FAPCHK.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result]

--View Create for M3.FGLEDG

DROP VIEW M3_FGLEDG

CREATE VIEW M3_FGLEDG AS 

SELECT DISTINCT * 
FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FGLEDG.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
WHERE
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records 
  and CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + DIVI 
      + CAST(YEA4 as VARCHAR(4)) 
      + CAST(JRNO as VARCHAR(7)) 
      + CAST(JSNO as VARCHAR(7)) 
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in ( 
          SELECT
            CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + DIVI 
            + CAST(YEA4 as VARCHAR(4)) 
            + CAST(JRNO as VARCHAR(7)) 
            + CAST(JSNO as VARCHAR(7)) 
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
          FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FGLEDG.parquet', FORMAT = 'PARQUET' ) AS [result] 
          GROUP BY CONO,DIVI,YEA4,JRNO,JSNO 
          )


--View Create for M3.CMNUSR

DROP VIEW M3_CMNUSR

CREATE VIEW M3_CMNUSR AS 

SELECT 
  DISTINCT * 
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/CMNUSR.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + CAST (DIVI as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + USID 
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
                CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + CAST (DIVI as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + USID 
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/CMNUSR.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, DIVI, USID
         )

    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + CUNO 
      + ITNO 
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + CUNO
            + ITNO 
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OCUSIT.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, CUNO, ITNO
         )

----------------------- Create View for OOHEAD
DROP VIEW M3_OOHEAD 
CREATE VIEW M3_OOHEAD AS

  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records

      + ORNO
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT

            + ORNO
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey]

----------------------- Create View for OOLINE
DROP VIEW M3_OOLINE  
CREATE VIEW M3_OOLINE AS 

SELECT 
  * 
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OOLINE.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + ORNO 
      + CAST(PONR as VARCHAR(6))
      + CAST(POSX as VARCHAR(3))
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + ORNO 
            + CAST(PONR as VARCHAR(6))
            + CAST(POSX as VARCHAR(3))
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OOLINE.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, ORNO, PONR, POSX
         )

----------------------- Create View for FBAKEY
DROP VIEW M3_FBAKEY  
CREATE VIEW M3_FBAKEY AS 


SELECT 
  * 
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FBAKEY.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + DIVI 
      + CAST(BAKY as VARCHAR(3))
      + BIT1
      + BIT2
      + BIT3
      + BIT4
      + BIT5
      + BIT6
      + BIT7
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + DIVI 
            + CAST(BAKY as VARCHAR(3))
            + BIT1
            + BIT2
            + BIT3
            + BIT4
            + BIT5
            + BIT6
            + BIT7
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FBAKEY.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, DIVI, BAKY, BIT1, BIT2, BIT3, BIT4, BIT5, BIT6, BIT7
         )

      + DIVI 
      + CAST(AITP as VARCHAR(3))
      + AITM
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + DIVI

            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FCHACC.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, DIVI, AITP, AITM
         )

DROP VIEW M3_MPHEAD

                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/MPHEAD.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, PUNO
         )

SELECT COUNT(*) from M3_MPHEAD

----------------------- Create View for MPLINE
DROP VIEW M3_MPLINE  
CREATE VIEW M3_MPLINE AS 


SELECT 
  DISTINCT *
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/MPLINE.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + PUNO 
      + CAST(PNLI as VARCHAR(3))
      + CAST(PNLS as VARCHAR(3))      
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + PUNO 
            + CAST(PNLI as VARCHAR(3))
            + CAST(PNLS as VARCHAR(3))  
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/MPLINE.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, PUNO, PNLI, PNLS
         ) 

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM M3_MPLINE

DROP VIEW M3_ODHEAD

      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + ORNO
            + WHLO
            + CAST(DLIX as VARCHAR(11))

----------------------- Create View for ODLINE
DROP VIEW M3_ODLINE  
CREATE VIEW M3_ODLINE AS 

SELECT 
  DISTINCT *
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/ODLINE.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + ORNO
      + CAST(PONR as VARCHAR(30))
      + CAST(POSX as VARCHAR(30))
      + CAST(DLIX as VARCHAR(11))
      + TEPY    
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + ORNO
      + CAST(PONR as VARCHAR(30))
      + CAST(POSX as VARCHAR(30))
      + CAST(DLIX as VARCHAR(11))
      + TEPY    
      + CAST(max(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30))  AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/ODLINE.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, ORNO, PONR, POSX, DLIX, TEPY
         ) 

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM M3_ODLINE


----------------------- Create View for OOADRE
DROP VIEW M3_OOADRE  
CREATE VIEW M3_OOADRE AS 

SELECT 
  DISTICT *
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OOADRE.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + ORNO
      + CAST(ADRT as VARCHAR(2))
      + ADID    
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + ORNO
            + CAST(ADRT as VARCHAR(2))
            + ADID  
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OOADRE.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, ORNO, ADRT, ADID
         ) 

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM M3_OOADRE

----------------------- Create View for FBAVAL
DROP VIEW M3_FBAVAL  
CREATE VIEW M3_FBAVAL AS 

SELECT 
  DISTINCT *
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FBAVAL.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + CAST(PTID as VARCHAR(18)) 
      + CAST(VTYP as VARCHAR(1))
      + CAST(BUNO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + BVER
      + CAST(YEA4 as VARCHAR(4))  
      + CAST(PERI as VARCHAR(2))    
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
        + CAST(BUNO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + BVER
            + CAST(YEA4 as VARCHAR(4))  
            + CAST(PERI as VARCHAR(2)) 
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/FBAVAL.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, PTID, VTYP, BUNO, BVER, YEA4, PERI
         ) 

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM M3_FBAVAL in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
            + CAST(PTID as VARCHAR(18)) 
            + CAST(VTYP as VARCHAR(1))

                  ----------------------- Create View for MITWHL
DROP VIEW M3_MITWHL  
CREATE VIEW M3_MITWHL AS 

SELECT 
  DISTINCT *
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/MITWHL.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      +  WHLO
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      + WHLO
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/MITWHL.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, WHLO
         ) 

                           ----------------------- Create View for OCUSAD
DROP VIEW M3_OCUSAD  
CREATE VIEW M3_OCUSAD AS 

SELECT 
  DISTINCT *
FROM 
  OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OCUSAD.parquet', 
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
  ) AS [result] 
WHERE 
  deleted = 'false' --deleted is false to remove deleted records
  and   CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      +  CAST(CUNO AS VARCHAR(30))
      + CAST(ADRT AS VARCHAR(30))
      + CAST(ADID AS VARCHAR(30))
      + CAST(variationNumber as VARCHAR(30)) 
      in (
            SELECT 
              CAST(CONO as VARCHAR(3)) 
      +  CAST(CUNO AS VARCHAR(30))
      + CAST(ADRT AS VARCHAR(30))
      + CAST(ADID AS VARCHAR(30))
            + CAST(MAX(variationNumber) as VARCHAR(30)) AS [IncludeKey] 
            FROM 
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/OCUSAD.parquet', 
                FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
            ) AS [result] 
            GROUP BY 
            CONO, CUNO, ADRT, ADID
         )
